name_en: Fendi Mini By The Way logo Monogram, Chantilly material, tortoiseshell handle. The capacity is impressive, can hold a phone and daily small items. Has a shoulder strap/shoulder carry/hand carry. A top choice for an autumn/winter small bag.
name_cn:
Fendi Mini By The Way logo Monogram, Chantilly material, tortoiseshell handle. The capacity is impressive, can hold a phone and daily small items. Has a shoulder strap/shoulder carry/hand carry. A top choice for an autumn/winter small bag.
Search number: 801
Size 17x18x8cm. m48
